title: How to Get a Police Certificate – Ukraine - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate – Ukraine
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Extract from the Information and Analytical system "Records of Data on an Individual’s Criminal Prosecution and a Criminal Record"

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you are a citizen of Ukraine
- Contact the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Ukraine via the online service for issuing the police certificates. You can submit an electronic form and receive a certificate in the form of an extract through the electronic service by logging into your Personal Account using a qualified electronic signature. The service centers of the Ministry of Internal Affairs do not issue paper certificates.
- Obtain a police certificate electronically through the " Diia " mobile application.
The police certificate will be sent to your electronic address. Processing of an application takes up to 30 days. This service is free of charge.
- apply in person at your nearest Embassy of Ukraine. For more information, please visit the website of the nearest Ukrainian embassy or consular office.
- provide notarized authorization to a representative to apply on your behalf at the Informatization Department of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Ukraine (See Contact information)

### If you are not a citizen of Ukraine
Apply in person or provide notarized authorization to a representative to apply on your behalf at the Informatization Department of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Ukraine (See Contact information)
Apply in person or provide notarized authorization to a representative to apply at the nearest Embassy or consular office of Ukraine
Department of Ministry of Internal Affairs of Ukraine
10 Bogomolets Street, Kyiv Telephone: +38044-256-1460 Ministry of Internal Affairs website
